title: FarmAssistReboot
body:
[![Discord online users](https://img.shields.io/discord/881610309637398538?color=%235865F2&label=discord&logo=Discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/4v9gsBCgg8)

[![wiki](https://img.shields.io/badge/wiki-link?style=for-the-badge&color=purple)](https://plugins.sarhatabaot.net/v/farmassistreboot)
# FarmAssistReboot

FarmAssistReboot makes farming easier with auto replant. Provided the player has the matching seeds. 

## Features

- Auto replant: Wheat, Potatoes, Carrots, Beetroots, Nether Wart, Cactus, Cocoa Beans, Sugar Cane.
- Allows for auto-replant when grass or dirt is tilled.
- Multi-World support
- Allows replanting only when crops are fully grown.
- Global toggles and player by player toggles.
- Placeholders
- Multiple languages support. Currently: English, Hebrew, French, Portuguese (Brazil), Chinese (Simplified) (zh-Hans)
- Use permissions or don't (set to use permissions by default.)
